title: Updates
subtitle: Check for and apply binary updates to this GPROXY instance.

confirm.title: Download and stage update?
confirm.description: This downloads and stages the new binary. It takes effect after the operator restarts the service. The previous version is kept as .prev for rollback.

status.label: Update status
status.stagedRestartNotice: A new binary has been staged. Restart the GPROXY service for the update to take effect.

channel.label: Update Channel
channel.hint: Which release track this instance self-updates from.
